revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''5-4-330

A device which will give an alarm condition if prescribed limits for rotation are exceeded.

Note: In the U.K. a pyropress switch is a type of rotation monitor.

{{IALAFooter}}
